payment_clause.text: Payment must be made within 30 days of invoice receipt.
payment_clause.risk_hint: Missing or vague payment timelines create financial ambiguity.

liability_clause.text: Liability is limited to the total contract value.
liability_clause.risk_hint: Unclear liability terms increase legal and financial exposure.

termination_clause.text: Either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days written notice.
termination_clause.risk_hint: Missing termination terms may cause exit disputes.

confidentiality_clause.text: Both parties must keep all confidential information private.
confidentiality_clause.risk_hint: Lack of confidentiality clauses risks sensitive information leakage.

delivery_clause.text: The vendor must deliver the services according to the agreed timeline.

penalty_clause.text: A penalty will be imposed for delays in delivery.
penalty_clause.risk_hint: Absence of penalties weakens enforcement for missed obligations.

renewal_clause.text: The agreement may be renewed upon mutual written consent.
renewal_clause.risk_hint: Unclear renewal rules may create continuity disputes.

dispute_resolution_clause.text: Any dispute arising from this agreement shall be resolved through arbitration.
dispute_resolution_clause.risk_hint: Missing dispute resolution language can increase litigation risk.
